network.ike.workspace.WorkingSet

network.ike.workspace
 

  • Uses of WorkingSet in network.ike.workspace

    Methods in network.ike.workspace that return WorkingSet
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static WorkingSet
    WorkingSetResolver.resolve(Path startDir)
    Resolve the working set from a starting directory.
    static WorkingSet
    WorkingSetResolver.singleRepo(Path dir)
    Build a single-repository working set rooted at dir, without searching for a manifest — a working set of one.
